pr.title: Non-record: PrismLM v3 — DiffTransformer V2 + NorMuon + TrigramHash (val_bpb=1.1715)

output.summary: DiffTransformer V2 attention, NorMuon optimizer, and gated trigram hashing augment PrismLM v3's 11-layer GQA stack to test new attention/optimizer/tokenization combos.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training was standard, with validation evaluation only for reporting; no val-only training or shard-only training was performed.
techniques: DiffTransformer V2 noise-cancelling attention in final layers
NorMuon optimizer with per-neuron row-normalized Newton-Schulz updates
